creator: dl@leo.org
text:
Hi,

Thomas Gellekum wrote on Fri, Jun 15, 2001 at 01:04:33PM +0200:
{..]
> Which version of the port are you using ($FreeBSD$ string in
> xlockmore/Makefile)? The current port should DTRT with
> XFREE86_VERSION==4.
And it does. My fault, I forgot to set this in /etc/make.conf.
Sorry.

Best regards,
 Daniel
